_comment: New.txt #6 event manager. An event is a named bundle of effects callable from an interaction (ActionDef.emitsEvent), and later from asset states, quests and accidents. Effects map 1:1 onto existing subsystems - see ROADMAP_EVENTS.md and game/events.ts. Edit in tools/events.html.

effects.title: Coffee addiction
effects.body: Coffee is a great way to recover some energy quickly! Be careful, it is not free!

effects.title: Mirror unlocked!
effects.body: The mirror was unlocked in the catalog! Buy it if you need to increase your charisma!
